TableName.description: The name of the table to contain the item

Item.description: A map of attribute name/value pairs, one for each attribute. Only the primary key attributes are required, but you can optionally provide other attribute name-value pairs.

ConditionExpression.description: A condition that must be satisfied in order for a conditional PutItem operation to succeed

ExpressionAttributeNames.description: One or more substitution tokens for attribute names in an expression

ExpressionAttributeValues.description: One or more values that can be substituted in an expression

ReturnValues.description: Whether to return the item attributes as they appeared before the PutItem

ReturnConsumedCapacity.description: Determines the level of detail about provisioned throughput consumption

ReturnItemCollectionMetrics.description: Determines whether item collection metrics are returned
